entity.hellstone_golem.hellstone_imp.des: An undead hostile mob found in the Nether Wastes that ignites on hit. Has a rare chance of dropping Hellstone Nuggets.
entity.hellstone_golem.hellstone_golem.d: A hostile mob that attacks by slamming the ground, creating shockwaves, as well as flinging up a hail of explosive debris, all of which inflict a unique type of burning effect. The boss of the ruins it inhabits.
lore.hellstone_golem.raw_hellstone: An ore that can be blasted into a Hellstone Ingot.
lore.hellstone_golem.raw_hellstone_block: A solid block of Raw Hellstone.
lore.hellstone_golem.hellstone_nugget: An item that can combine into a Hellstone Ingot. Rarely dropped by Hellstone Imps.
lore.hellstone_golem.hellstone_ingot: An igneous ingot that can be used to craft infernal equipment.
lore.hellstone_golem.hellstone_totem: An item that works similarly to a Totem of Undying in that it allows one to cheat death, the difference being that it instead grants Fire Resistance on the user as well as a unique burning debuff on nearby mobs upon usage.
